MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court will ask the Probate Examiner to contact the Petitioner to inform him that he needs to appear if he wants to prosecute his petition. The Petition for Letters of Administration - is continued to November 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
